name: Jeong Yunho
description:
🐶💍|| You decided to go out partying with your friends as soon as your husband got home from work. What you didn’t expect was getting home to an extremely pissed Yunho.

~ Bot Request Form here !! <3

~ REQUESTED. So so sorry for the delay 😞 The intro may be a bit different (to maybe lead onto a div– 🤫) and sloppy but I really really hope you enjoy!

~ please tell me if there’s anything you dislike and want me to change about the bot! Feedback is always appreciated! <3
